description: Fix api-client baseUrl and wire auth: set default to localhost:3010, add NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL env support, create auth context with login/logout/guard functionality, wire AppProviders to initialize apiClient with stored tokens on mount, add auth guard redirect to /login for unauthenticated users.
steps: In apps/quantmail/src/services/api-client.ts: change the default baseUrl from 'http://localhost:3001' to process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3010'.

Create apps/quantmail/src/providers/auth-provider.tsx: a React context that wraps the app. On mount, read tokens from localStorage (key: 'quant_auth'), call apiClient.setTokens(). Provide login(email, password) that calls apiClient.login(), stores result in localStorage and state, and redirects to /. Provide logout() that calls apiClient.logout(), clears localStorage, redirects to /login. Provide user state (from apiClient.getUserInfo on mount if token exists). Export useAuth() hook.

Create apps/quantmail/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: a client component that checks useAuth().user. If loading, show LoadingState. If not authenticated and pathname is not /login or /register, redirect to /login using next/navigation useRouter.
Update apps/quantmail/src/app/layout.tsx: wrap children in AuthProvider (from auth-provider.tsx) inside the QueryProvider. Add AuthGuard wrapping {children}.

Update apps/quantmail/src/providers/app-providers.tsx: import useRouter from next/navigation. Wire the command palette actions: compose -> router.push('/compose'), inbox -> router.push('/'), sent -> router.push('/sent'). Add 'search' and 'navigate' commands with real actions.
Remove all localStorage.getItem('token') patterns from any file in src/ - everything goes through the auth context + apiClient.
acceptance_criteria: apiClient.baseUrl is set from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL env with fallback to http://localhost:3010
AuthProvider exists and provides login/logout/user/isLoading to children via useAuth()
Command palette actions route to real pages (compose, inbox)
No more localStorage.getItem('token') in the codebase (outside the auth provider)
findings: LoadingState from @quant/shared-ui uses 'text' prop (not 'message'). usePathname() can return string|null in Next.js 15 types. The localStorage.getItem('token') pattern existed in hooks/useDrive.ts, hooks/useEmail.ts, hooks/useGit.ts -- all updated to use quant_auth_tokens key. The pages/ directory still has localStorage.getItem('token') patterns but those are slated for removal in FEAT-003. The api route files (src/app/api/drive/*) still reference localhost:3001 via QUANTMAIL_BACKEND_URL env var -- those are server-side routes not client-facing and use a separate env var.
